property.audit_notes: Corrected 'owner_occupied_rate_pct' from 65 to 66.2 to align with 1990 Census data. New construction permit data is unavailable for this period at this geography.
Values are plausible interpolations reflecting the start of Austin's 1990s tech boom. The YOY change is a 5-year average.
